caption: A woman with long dark hair is seen from behind, her hands clasped, facing another woman in a professional setting. The second woman, facing the camera, has blonde-highlighted hair and wears a blue medical scrub top and a light blue surgical mask. They are seated at a light-colored wooden table in a room with neutral-toned walls, with a framed certificate visible in the background. To the right, the arm of another person is partially visible. A purple logo of a stylized person accompanies the on-screen text "Day 4" in the bottom left and "Sim Week" next to a small building icon in the bottom right. Throughout the sequence, the woman in scrubs remains seated and attentive, while the woman in the foreground stays relatively still, maintaining their face-to-face interaction across the scene.
